short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $1.47B in FY2026 Q1, +18.7% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $1.29B (-12.2% vs current Q) — set by 24 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $1.65 vs current $273.00.
Margin context: 22.8% net margin (29.3% op margin) — expansion likely.
Next earnings: 2026-07-21 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is constructive — consensus is achievable based on current run-rate.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $6B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $5B → FY2 $6B (+12.7% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 28.0% — structural premium business over the long-cycle view.
7-quarter run-rate CAGR: +24.5% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
Sector thesis (Information Technology): Multi-year AI/cloud capex cycle remains the dominant secular theme.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if growth durability + margin expansion both hold.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 50.3% — elevated (premium-selling favored).
Put/Call OI: 0.97 — balanced flow.
30-day implied move: ±11.8% ($329.57 – $417.61) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.
ATM skew: -1.03pp — call skew (upside bid — bullish positioning).

short_term.strategy: Bull call spread 30 DTE: long $374 / short $392. Mid IV (50%) + uptrend → defined-risk directional with reasonable cost basis.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 46.7% across 7 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 7 dates spanning 90–608 DTE.
90-day implied move: ±22.9% ($287.93 – $459.25).
209-day implied move: ±35.9% ($239.65 – $507.53) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $340 (-9.0% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Flat term structure (-3.7pp) — no near-term event premium; long-dated vol fairly priced.
long_term.strategy: Sell 6-month strangle: short $336 put / short $411 call. Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling on both sides; profits if spot stays within ±10%; manage with rolls or assignment.
